title: Modernization vs. Rebuild Analysis
description: Execute a data-driven analysis to determine whether to modernize an existing legacy system or perform a complete rebuild. Implement strategies such as the Strangler Fig pattern or parallel run approaches for system evolution or replacement.
objectives: Execute a data-driven analysis to determine whether to modernize an existing legacy system or perform a complete rebuild.
Implement strategies such as the Strangler Fig pattern or parallel run approaches for system evolution or replacement.
